summary: Uninstall Apps no longer shows apps you already deleted, and failed uninstalls now explain what went wrong.
changed: Uninstall Apps — opening the tab re-validates the app list against disk so manually deleted apps disappear without a full rescan
fixed: Uninstall Apps — ghost entries for apps already removed from Applications are dropped from the list on refresh
Uninstall Apps — failed uninstall now shows an alert explaining why nothing moved (e.g. app already gone or Full Disk Access needed) instead of failing silently
